mapper.select:
SELECT A.CONTENTID , A.APIID , TITLE, ADDR1 , A.CONTENTTYPEID, B.CONTENTDIV , FIRSTIMAGE , NVL(C.REVIEW_COUNT, 0) AS REVIEWCOUNT , NVL(AVG_RATING, 0) AS AVGRATING , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.MODIFIEDTIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MODIFIEDTIME FROM CONTENT A JOIN CONTENTCATEGORY B ON A.CONTENTTYPEID = B.CONTENTTYPEID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CONTENTID, COUNT(*) AS REVIEW_COUNT, AVG(NVL(RATING, 0)) AS AVG_RATING FROM CONTENT_REVIEW WHERE BLIND_YN = 'N' GROUP BY CONTENTID ) C ON A.CONTENTID = C.CONTENTID
ORDER BY A.MODIFIEDTIME DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT A.CONTENTID , A.APIID , TITLE, ADDR1, ADDR2 , A.CONTENTTYPEID, B.CONTENTDIV , MAPX, MAPY , FIRSTIMAGE, FIRSTIMAGE2 , NVL(C.REVIEW_COUNT, 0) AS REVIEWCOUNT , NVL(AVG_RATING, 0) AS AVGRATING , D.EVENTSTARTDATE AS EVENTSTARTDATE , D.EVENTENDDATE AS EVENTENDDATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.CREATEDTIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATEDTIME , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.MODIFIEDTIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MODIFIEDTIME FROM CONTENT A JOIN CONTENTCATEGORY B ON A.CONTENTTYPEID = B.CONTENTTYPEID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CONTENTID, COUNT(*) AS REVIEW_COUNT, AVG(NVL(RATING, 0)) AS AVG_RATING FROM CONTENT_REVIEW WHERE BLIND_YN = 'N' GROUP BY CONTENTID ) C ON A.CONTENTID = C.CONTENTID LEFT JOIN CONTENTEVENT D ON A.CONTENTID = D.CONTENTID WHERE A.CONTENTID = #{contentId}
SELECT CONTENTIMAGEID, ORIGINIMGURL, IMGNAME FROM CONTENTIMAGE WHERE APIID = (SELECT APIID FROM CONTENT WHERE CONTENTID = #{contentId})
